info_dialog.manual_page1_contents:
A turn-based abstract 
strategy game like chess.
info_dialog.manual_page2_contents:
The first to move 
their piece 
to the opposite side wins.
info_dialog.manual_page3_contents:
Each player gets 1 piece 
and 10 walls.
info_dialog.manual_page4_contents:
You can move your piece 
or place a wall.
info_dialog.manual_page5_contents_1:
(Default) 
Move one square
up, down, left, or right.
info_dialog.manual_page5_contents_2:
(When adjacent
to a piece)
Jump over it.
info_dialog.manual_page5_contents_3:
(When jumping over) 
If a wall is behind 
the piece, 
move diagonally.
info_dialog.manual_page6_contents_1:
Drag vertically or
horizontally 
on the board to place
a temporary wall.
info_dialog.manual_page6_contents_2:
Tap the temp wall again 
to place it.
info_dialog.manual_page6_contents_3:
Temp walls disappear 
when tapping elsewhere.
info_dialog.manual_page6_contents_4:
You must not block 
your own or their path.
